verdicts.reason: Flux two ramekins of cheesy rice with broccoli and pasta — reads as the dish, hero composition
olive oil decanter with olives and lavender — completely off-topic
closed grilled-cheese panini sandwich, not the British open-faced version
pile of cheese scones with golden cheese baked on top — strong hero
same cheese-scone image with golden cheese topping — right dish
Flux twisted golden pastry straws on parchment with cheese on the side — right dish, hero composition

pan-seared sea bass fillet with crispy skin, with braised fennel and tomatoes in a tomato-wine sauce, side of new potatoes — reads as a cooked sea bass hero (chermoula proper would be greener but the dish concept is right)
Southern-style chicken with flat pastry dumplings in cream gravy with a roll — composition is amateur but the dish is unambiguously right
Flux chicken in mushroom-cream sauce with herbs — reads as chasseur, hero composition
raw ribeye steak with rosemary and spices on dark slate — not the breaded cubed-steak dish
Flux pleated bag-dumplings (more khinkali/money-bag than gyoza) — gyoza are crescent half-moons
Flux chicken parmesan over pasta — jalfrezi is a thick tomato-pepper Indian curry, not this
live baby chick on grass — completely off-topic
BBQ-style spicy chicken drumsticks on a wire rack — not shawarma
Flux chicken with whole onions, lemon slices and golden apricot-like fruits in saffron broth — Moroccan-styled with visible lemon, reads as tagine
raw chicken breasts on a white plate
same raw chicken breasts image
bread slices, olives and olive oil being poured — no salad
bowl of chili with beans, corn and ground meat in red sauce — right dish, hero composition
fresh whole red chilies in a bowl, not the cooked jam
close-up of dried dates on wood, not fudge
chocolate cookies with molten chocolate-hazelnut centers, one with a bite oozing the filling — strong hero
ramekin of chocolate mousse with shaved chocolate on top, chocolate-bar props (slight brand-imprint on side prop but the hero dish is correct)
ramekin of chocolate overnight oats with chocolate buttons and almonds, oats scattered — right dish
chocolate pudding/lava cake with vanilla ice cream and cherries, chocolate sauce drizzle — close enough to self-saucing pudding, hero composition
Christmas tablescape with various dishes, candles and evergreens — no clear salmon hero
loaf of flour-dusted ciabatta on marble — right bread, hero composition
vanilla ice cream with caramel sauce and toffee chunks — reads as cinder-toffee/honeycomb ice cream
chia-pudding parfaits with mango and strawberry — wrong flavor (should be cinnamon-brown swirl)
scoop of cinnamon ice cream with cinnamon sticks and dust scattered on a teal table — right dish
just cinnamon sticks and ground cinnamon — no almonds
raw rolled oats on marble — not a smoothie
